LORE >>> CONTRACTORS
A Contractor, also known as a "Constant" or a "Con" is an elite, immortal being who gave up their mortal soul to The Council in exchange for supernatural powers and one [1] wish being granted at the time of their death.DDM Inc. has 8 7 Contractors who form an elite board which manages DDM Inc's activities. However, a Contractor's main responsibility is service to the The Cause - preserving reality by sealing tears in the multiverse.
LORE >>> ACES
Assistant Contractor Elite Specialists, ACEs (plural) or ACE (singular), are mortals who have formed soul contracts with Contractors, pledging service in exchange for demi-immortality, enhanced senses and increased physical ability.ACEs are loyal and experience desire and affection towards their Contractor regardless of their personal beliefs or feelings as a consequence of their soul bond. This experience is one-way. An ACE must obey a direct order from their contractor or their body will begin to degrade.
